init_hook: echo 'Setting up Gantry Board development environment...'
if command -v mold > /dev/null 2>&1; then export RUSTFLAGS="-C link-arg=-fuse-ld=mold"; fi
if ! command -v sqlx > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'Installing sqlx-cli (first time only)...'; cargo install sqlx-cli --no-default-features --features sqlite --locked; fi
if ! command -v cargo-watch > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'Installing cargo-watch (first time only)...'; cargo install cargo-watch --locked; fi
if [ ! -d frontend/node_modules ]; then echo 'Installing frontend dependencies...'; (cd frontend && npm ci); fi
echo '  Run "task --list" to see available commands.'
echo '  Run "devbox services up" to start backend + frontend.'

scripts.setup-db: cd backend && sqlx database create && sqlx migrate run
scripts.reset-db: cd backend && sqlx database drop -y && sqlx database create && sqlx migrate run
